name: Tarragon Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and halved
1/2 cup Flour seasoned to taste with salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 10-inch skillet.
2. Saute shallots for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms and saute for 3-4 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
4. Dip chicken breasts lightly into flour and saute until browned on both sides. Remove and keep warm.
5. Deglaze pan with white wine and chicken stock.
6. Add parsley and tarragon; over high heat, reduce to sauce consistency.
7. Add mushrooms and shallots; pour over chicken breasts.
4 servings
Fat 10.9 grams per serving
